description_long: This is a two-story school building with a dark exterior, featuring multiple rectangular windows arranged symmetrically along its facades. The roof is a complex, multi-angled structure with a prominent central section and several smaller roof elements, including a green conical turret and a cylindrical tower. A tall, black chimney rises from one side of the roof, while a metal staircase is visible on the rear, suggesting emergency egress. The main entrance is marked by a set of double doors and a small overhang, and the building sits on a flat base that could represent a sidewalk or foundation. The overall design is utilitarian with some decorative elements, such as the turret and arched windows, hinting at early 20th-century institutional architecture.
description: A dark, two-story school building with symmetrical windows, a complex roof, a green turret, and a tall chimney. Features include a main entrance, rear staircase, and decorative architectural details.
description_view_0: Side view showing the main roof, green turret, chimney, and rows of windows.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entrance, symmetrical windows, and the green turret to the right.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a clear look at the cylindrical tower, rear staircase, and additional roof details.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back facade, windows, and the metal staircase along the side.
